title: Prognosis
description: A real-time prediction of a vehicle's arrival or departure time at a stop, including an indication of prediction confidence.

certainty.description: Confidence of the prognosis (e.g. real, prognosis, calculated, unknown)

delaySeconds.description: Delay in seconds relative to the scheduled time

id.description: Unique identifier for the tracking record

url.description: URL endpoint for real-time tracking information

validity.description: Validity period for this tracking record
